programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics gather in front of their TVs once more to give their thoughts on the week's programming. Shows subjected to their scrutiny include The Great British Bake Off, Coronation Street, Educating Yorkshire, The Inheritance, Stranded on Honeymoon Island, The Guest, The Dog House and BBC News coverage of Donald Trump's tariffs

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: A pair of teenage schoolgirls ask Sam and his crew to make a movie about their favourite teacher, Miss Stanthorpe, who never got a chance to go to her own prom. The headmaster backs the project in a bid to look cool, hapless Sebastian spills food on his top - reverting to his childlike self and rejoining Year 8 - and the girls compete over who should play the young Miss Stanthorpe. Comedy from the mind of Sam Campbell, who stars alongside Lara Ricote, Aaron Chen and David Hargreaves

programme.title: Make That Movie
programme.desc: Gurnsfield United are a bottom league team without a chance, but number one fan Ewin wants to see them win, if only on the big screen. Sam and the gang can't resist making such an innocent dream come true - only to find themselves being sued by an eccentric British writer for inadvertently stealing one of his characters

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty learns he has a long-lost daughter, but ruins any chances of a happy family life by gambling away her most prized possession in a high-stakes poker game. Featuring the guest voices of Drew Barrymore, John Updike, Amy Tam and Stephen King

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa joins an environmental protection group and begins campaigning in a last-ditch attempt to prevent the city's oldest redwood tree being felled by a rich Texan. With the voice of Joshua Jackson

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer stages a revolt against moves to give Springfield a new telephone dialling code, stirring up public indignation and splitting the town down the middle. Featuring the guest voices of the Who and Gary Coleman

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The family turn their attention to Sarah's dad's old caravan, tucked away in the corner of the barn. Sarah plans to transform the caravan into a beautiful living and sleeping space for when the family band is on tour. With only a few weeks until their first festival gig, the whole family pitch in to clean, gut and paint it, and then lay the new floor - a lino print inspired by a Persian rug

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Dumfries to meet Maggie, whose farm holds an extraordinary collection of memorabilia

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie is prompted to retaliate when Doug falls in love with a designer aftershave that she cannot stand. Meanwhile, Arthur attempts to teach Spence and Holly the art of movie-hopping. American comedy, starring Kevin James, Leah Remini and Jerry Stiller

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie uses her extra income to hire a maid, making Doug feel so jealous that he decides to employ his own domestic help - in the form of Spence's mother Veronica. Unfortunately, she proves more of a liability than an asset around the house. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug decides to pursue his dream of becoming a bartender, but Carrie is unimpressed with his plans. Meanwhile, Arthur also attempts a career change, entering the dangerous world of politics. American comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce their plans to move into a retirement home in New Jersey - much to the relief of their family. While Robert is overjoyed to be getting his hands on his parents' house at last, Debra is surprised to find she has misgivings about losing touch with her in-laws

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray visit Frank and Marie, only to learn they are facing eviction from their new home - so Robert is forced to let them move back in with him. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray realises that the angrier Debra gets, the better their sex life becomes - so he decides to stir up conflict between her and Marie. American comedy, starring Patricia Heaton, Doris Roberts and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles plans a holiday at his newly acquired cabin to get over the shock of Daphne's blossoming romance with Donny, and later joins forces with a lovelorn Roz to end the couple's relationship. Comedy, with David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to reclaim his luxury apartment but finds obstacles in his path, including a tap-dancing grief counsellor and wary neighbours. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by Matt Morsia, Adrian Lester, Samantha Barks, Sam C Wilson and Fearne Cotton. With music from Talia Mar

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: In one of the most ambitious and eccentric builds ever, a man attempts to build a miniature canal and lock to house a narrow boat - and then turns the boat itself into something never before seen on the series. George also visits a house full of colour in London and an all-black, one-bedroom hotel housed in an old industrial crane in Denmark, while Will Hardie checks out a wooden home in a horsebox. Together, the pair put the final touch to their 18th-century-inspired cabin in the sky.

programme.title: The Beautiful Game (2024)
programme.desc: Veteran football scout Mal persuades a talented but troubled former striker to play for England in the 20th edition of the Homeless World Cup in Rome. To win and overcome the South African favourites in their group, the England players will have to find common ground off the pitch. Sporting comedy drama, starring Bill Nighy, Micheal Ward and Susan Wokoma

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones is joined by David Coulthard, Mark Webber and Lawrence Barretto to present action from the sixth round of the campaign, held at Circuit de Monaco. Lando Norris of McLaren was the victorious driver last year, with Ferrari's Charles Leclerc second and Norris' teammate Oscar Piastri finishing third

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane at work, the chance of a romance leads him to confess secrets that he's kept quiet for years. But when Clive and Leo discover the truth about Calico Road, they're thrown into open warfare. Marie, Saul and George have no choice but to join the battle, as the two households conspire against each other. But Clive's fury won't be stopped, and the danger to Leo gets closer

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces, including the likes of Vernon Kay and Paddy McGuinness, Denise Van Outen and Johnny Vaughan, Vicky Pattison and Pete Wicks, Bez and Shaun Ryder, Ashley Banjo and Perri Kiely, Rylan and mum Linda, and Roman and Martin Kemp sit down to give their sharp, insightful and funny thoughts on the week's TV

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A hairdresser and a builder show that age is just a number. A hip-hop artist meets a musician looking for love off stage. Two 19-year-olds take their first dating steps together and a weightlifter and a bodybuilder weigh up their options

programme.title: Nomadland (2020)
programme.desc: A middle-aged woman is left out of work following the economic collapse of her entire home town. She begins a life outside of conventional society, becoming a modern-day nomad and finding a community of like-minded people adopting a life on the road. Drama, starring Frances McDormand and David Strathairn

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: The boys decide to try their hand at wildlife photography. Charlie and Rafferty build their very own deer hide, while Sarah heads to Dumfries House in western Scotland to attend a tea dance in her role as an ambassador for the King's Foundation. The visit inspires Sarah and Graham to use their new barn to host their own spectacular tea party for a local charity's 75th anniversary

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: An entrepreneur leaves his pet in Rebecca's apparently capable hands, but Sam jeopardises her job by letting the dog escape. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam still believes he can win over Rebecca, especially when she admits there is a song that makes her feel romantic. Cliff trains a new female postal worker, but ends up falling for her. Comedy, starring John Ratzenberger

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Woody turns on the charm while serving at a party for Kelly, the beautiful daughter of a wealthy Cheers executive in a bid to win her affection. American comedy, guest starring Jackie Swanson, with Woody Harrelson and Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Members of the parent-teacher association complain about Debra's outfits, leaving Ray facing the delicate task of persuading her to dress more conservatively in future. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ally comes home with a low grade on her report card. Ray is inclined to blame the teacher, but it turns out there is another reason why she is feeling distracted in class. Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton star, with Madylin Sweeten

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Frank are pressured by their wives to join Robert in one of his therapy sessions - but the three of them decide to go to the racetrack instead

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Feuding brothers Niles and Frasier decide to find out once and for all which of them has the higher IQ. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes a dislike to KACL's newest presenter, sharp-tongued radio psychiatrist Dr Nora. Award-winning episode of the comedy series, guest starring Christine Baranski and Piper Laurie

programme.title: Frasier
programme.sub-title: When a Man Loves Two Women
programme.desc: Cassandra Stone, the woman Frasier dated on Valentine's Day, agrees to go out with him again - but the appearance of his former girlfriend Faye, who has been out of the country for a while, complicates matters. Comedy, guest starring Virginia Madsen and Amy Brenneman

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Daphne agrees to marry Donny, but has a vision that suggests he is wrong for her, and tempts fate by turning to Niles for advice on how to proceed

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz pick the collection of a reclusive and mysterious businessman named 'the Colonel', who has gone to great lengths to keep his identity secret

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Live from Westminster with the latest news on the PM

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Master mechanic Fuzz Townshend and petrolhead Tim Shaw return to rescue more classic cars for deserving owners. They begin in County Down in Northern Ireland where the 1987 MG Metro 6R4 rally car has turned up in a scrapyard. The family of rally enthusiast Brian put in the call when a serious stroke prevented him from restoring his amazing discovery, and former driver David Gillanders joins in the fun to rescue the car he last drove three decades ago

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: More stories of British people rebuilding abandoned historic settlements in Europe. A Scottish lawyer of Italian origin falls in love with the village his forefathers left behind, while Paul and Yip fight to breathe life into their French village

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mark Chapman in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Leah Charles-King helps Karen, a semi-retired lawyer, and Brian, a retired firefighte. They've decided to take a leap and follow their dream of making a permanent move to the mountain villages of Málaga Province in southern Spain

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Josh, Hayley and their three children leave Lincoln to cruise closer to family in Milton Keynes, racing against time before their new baby arrives. After 25 years at home in Lancashire, fledgling boater Tom finally casts off from his parents, swapping his childhood bedroom for his own narrowboat and a whole new world. In Birmingham, mature student Gen's plumbing springs a surprise

programme.title: Chateau DIY: Australia
programme.desc: Australians gamble everything to restore historic French estates. In Occitanie, DIY duo Janet and Philip start work on restoring their towering 20-metre stairwell, while in the Loire Valley, Suzie races against the clock to transform a 200-year-old disused cattle shed into a showstopping wine bar before nearly 100 guests fly in from Australia for a lavish wedding

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Sophie and Charlotte help sisters Sandra and Ann from Castle Douglas find Sandra's dream holiday home in the Spanish sun for a maximum budget of 75,000 euros

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: The dedicated team at Woodgreen Pets Charity continue their mission to find homes for abandoned dogs by matchmaking them with hopeful new owners. Glamorous poodle-cross Lola needs to live up to five-year-old Violet's idea of what a dog should look like, while Frankie the Chihuahua plays it cool when he meets best friends Paulette and Jackie. There's a double date in store as Welsh couple Liam and Tabitha meet two very different dogs - Barley the bouncy labradoodle and cuddly Staffie puppy Peanut. However, sparks fly between the two hounds, and it falls to Tabitha to have the final say

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: Leo and Clive stand alone, face-to-face, in the ultimate confrontation on a night of terror. Meanwhile, Zee reaches out to help George, and they embark on a joyous voyage of discovery. It's a wild night on the streets of Manchester, as violence explodes, souls are laid bare, dangerous games are played and decisions are made that will have terrible consequences for everyone

programme.title: All Of Us Strangers (2023)
programme.desc: Fortysomething screenwriter Adam wrestles with a creative block as he attempts to channel childhood memories into words on his laptop screen. Out of curiosity, he visits his childhood home in Sanderstead and discovers the ghosts of his parents linger at the property. Drama based on Taichi Yamada's novel, starring Andrew Scott, Paul Mescal, Jamie Bell and Claire Foy

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: Surgeons Brett and Pete use bone hooks and levers to try pull paratrooper Lee's pelvis out of his spinal canal after a high-speed paragliding accident in France. In south-west London, 86 year-old Veronica comes into St George's Hospital with an open ankle fracture after a car accident but doctors worry there's a vascular injury and she could lose her foot. At St Mary's, Heidi has surgery after a vicious dog attack and 56 year-old plasterer Lee is brought in by air ambulance after a car crash where emergency doctors took over an hour to extract him from the vehicle

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: Gypsy is told that Ryan will be listed as her baby's legal father until a court-ordered paternity test is completed. Social media gossiping doesn't help the situation

programme.title: Gypsy Rose: Life After Lock Up
programme.desc: As Gypsy awaits paternity test results, she plans a 'Babymoon' with Ken to revive their relationship amid social media scrutiny

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna feels out of place and struggles to settle back into old routines, seeking guidance from a trusted confidant. David begins to find his feet again, helping out old friends. But as he wrestles with his true feelings, Susan encourages him to take action and face his fears. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: As Susan's wedding approaches, David must figure out what it really means to let love in. Anna seeks a fresh start, undeterred by the challenges, and finding support and encouragement from an unlikely source. But as they both embrace change, will their paths bring them together?

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Norfolk to meet upcycler and bike enthusiast Simon. The items they uncover include a filing cabinet, a trunk and a classic bicycle

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions as the village gathers for Diane's funeral, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them. A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families. Also, Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Mark Chapman in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Lilith and Frasier use Carla's six-year-old son as a subject on which to practise their parenting skills. Bar-room comedy, guest starring Jarrett Lennon, with Kelsey Grammer, Bebe Neuwirth and Rhea Perlman

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca attempts to impress the corporate bigwigs by promoting Norm's painting business, while Sam's sporty girlfriend leaves him exhausted. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Frasier and a pregnant Lilith reject civilisation and move to the wilderness to enjoy a more natural way of life, while Woody is forced to take his first holiday since he came to work at the bar

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents to Thanksgiving dinner, and Raymond sees something shocking that convinces him they are getting back together. The truth, however, proves far stranger. Robert Culp and Katherine Helmond guest star

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is annoyed to discover Marie is plying his brother with gifts of scented candles and massage oils. However, his mood changes when he deduces her real motive - to put Robert in a romantic mood, in the hope he will provide her with grandchildren

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy's brother Peter turns to Ray for advice on talking to women, while Debra decides to help out by throwing a party and inviting all her single friends

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray visit Frank and Marie, only to learn they are facing eviction from their new home - so Robert is forced to let them move back in with him. American comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.desc: The Crane brothers plan a dinner party, but agonise over who to invite, and devise an unusual game to determine the final guest list. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer starts his own web page and begins revealing the intimate secrets of everyone in Springfield - but ends up making powerful enemies who imprison him on an island. Featuring the voice of Patrick McGoohan

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge helps a former convict fulfil his artistic ambitions by painting a mural at the school, but he soon clashes with Principal Skinner over the design. With the guest voice of Michael Keaton

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer uncovers a plan to move his beloved Springfield Isotopes baseball team to New Mexico, so he takes desperate measures to keep them in town and goes on hunger strike in protest. With the guest voice of Stacy Keach

Together, the pair put the final touch to their 18th-century-inspired cabin in the sky.

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tuckers board the train for an eventful journey to Dede's wedding. Claire and Mitchell work on their speech, Phil and Cam are starstruck when they spot their favourite author on the train, Manny and Luke go girl crazy and Gloria finds herself stuck in a frustrating situation. Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All three families trying to cope with their separate holiday experiences, before everyone tries to make their way back home in time for Father's Day. The Dunphys are wrapping up their trip to New York City, while Cam and Mitchell are caring for Cam's dying grandmother in Missouri, and Jay, Gloria and Manny are attending a wedding in Mexico - but all of their respective trips are thrown into turmoil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay tries to make a good impression on his new neighbours, while Cam and Mitchell attempt to teach Lily a message of acceptance

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a modernised Springfield Elementary School has a technical meltdown, Lisa does her best to transform it into a different institution. During the process, Groundskeeper Willie coaches her and the other members of the Mathlympics team for an important maths quiz against their Waverly Hill rivals

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts an edition packed with festive surprises. Countdown regulars Susie Dent and Rachel Riley are on hand to help maintain order as Jon Richardson and Sarah Millican take on Lee Mack and Jason Manford. They are joined by guests Nick Mohammed and Joe Wilkinson

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz as Richard Ayoade and Sara Pascoe take on Jon Richardson and Chris McCausland. Regular Countdown mathematician Rachel Riley and lexicographer Susie Dent are on hand to adjudicate, aided by Morgana Robinson in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan Bones from Essex is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Nikki Bacon her perfect wedding. The couple met on a blind date two years earlier, but despite their fairytale romance, the groom's ideas for the ceremony may not live up to the bride's hopes for a pink, girly and fun event

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to make up for past mistakes by giving his fiancee Lydia the wedding of her dreams. However, his history of reckless spending and determination to plan a lavish party do not bode well for the bride, who has her heart set on a church ceremony just like her mother's

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A tattoo artist is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to incorporate his love of heavy metal into the day. However, his obsessively organised bride expects nothing less than the fairy-tale wedding of her dreams, complete with castles, sparkles and magical unicorns

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Chicago-based hardware retailer True Value's CEO and president John Hartmann poses as a handyman taking part in a reality show to go incognito among his own workforce to see how he can extend the company's lifespan and improve the experiences of both customers and employees

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bill Peduto, 60th Mayor of Pittsburgh, who comes from a proud family of Pennsylvania steel workers, goes incognito among his own workforce posing as a reality show contestant from Kentucky. In the 10 months since he was elected, many changes have been made in Pittsburgh and Bill wants to make sure they are effective and to hear directly from the city's employees

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples host dinner parties in Essex, with an eye on the £1,000 prize. The first couple to host are flight attendant Penny and doctors' surgery manager Chris. Their homely menu doesn't quite live up to the standards of bling-loving receptionist Tatia and her husband, metal worker Mick. The youngest duo, Lewis and Krystal, host on day two and manage to impress their older guests. Finally, it's Mick and Tatia's chance to show off their culinary skills with a fancy menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts Jade and Stuart kick off the competition in Essex with a fun and spontaneous menu. On day two, Mark and Diane bring a taste of their Mediterranean travels to their menu, by way of their garden, and encourage their guests to sing with them. Finally it's the turn of image-conscious Chris and Rosella to wow their guests with Rosella's nana's Italian recipe. Brewing tension from the week finally comes to a head, before the winner is revealed

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north east of England compete - loved-up musicians Nick and Kelly, laidback Michael and Becky, and Matthew and Katie with their refined French cuisine

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to Loudonville, Ohio, to rescue Landoll's Mohican Castle, a custom-built, multimillion-dollar hotel set in an 1100-acre woodland estate. Co-owner Marta is struggling, having been left with the entire burden of running such a large establishment alone. Can Gordon persuade her son Jimmy to finally take the reins and turn this business around before the family legacy is destroyed?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels across the United States in search of restaurants in dire need of renovation - and after analysing their situation, he has just 24 hours to bring them back from the brink of disaster. His first stop is the New York community of Congers, where he hopes to save family-run Italian restaurant Bella Gianna's. Gordon and his team work round the clock to clean the premises, remodel the interior and revamp the menu, while also teaching the staff to prepare new dishes and work together as an efficient unit. What will the customers think of the new-look restaurant?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is given just 24 hours to improve troubled American restaurants, continuing with in New Orleans with the Old Coffee Pot, a century-old bistro that used to be one of the best breakfast spots in the area. Gordon and his team brighten up the kitchen and dining area and introduce new dishes. But what will the staff think of the changes?

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to the heart of Los Angeles, California, to save the Brownstone Bistro, a Caribbean fusion restaurant. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to renovate the premises with a vibrant look, create more space in the cramped kitchen and introduce a simplified menu featuring fresh and authentic Caribbean fare, working around the clock to teach the staff how to cook the dishes

programme.title: Ramsay's 24 Hours to Hell and Back
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Greenville, Mississippi, to save fine dining establishment Sherman's Restaurant, which has been a presence in the town for 30 years. The chef and his team have just 24 hours to revamp the premises, clean and renovate the kitchen and introduce a new menu featuring update versions of the restaurant's staple dishes, working around the clock to teach the staff how to prepare them

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No-naughty-bits version. programme.desc: Buffalo Wings & Rings president Nader Masadeh goes undercover to work in his own company to ensure his standards are being executed across the brand

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

Lowell has ambitious plans for expansion and takes the opportunity to work alongside a cashier, two chefs and a forklift operator to find out what state his business is in.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part two of two. Gordon Ramsay continues his battle to restore the failing Town's Inn in Harpers Ferry, West Virginia. After witnessing abysmal food hygiene practices in the restaurant, the chef is left in disbelief as he uncovers terrifying cleanliness issues throughout the hotel. Can he win over stubborn owner Karan Townsend and persuade her to turn things round?

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell

programme.desc: Sam Dushey, the CEO of Shoppers World, goes undercover in his own company. programme.desc: Tim Betts, the CEO of Muscle Maker Grill, goes undercover in the company he recently bought. programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his two-part challenge at Mangia Mangia in Woodland Park, Colorado. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in Redondo Beach, California, for the first of two visits to Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece Faye and Brenda. Faye believes she has the weight of the entire restaurant on her shoulders, while Brenda feels she isn't treated as an equal in the business. With tensions rising, the food not up to scratch and everyone playing the blame game, the chef is faced with one of the trickiest situations he's ever encountered

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Martin and the bullies have to run for their lives when a weekend in the wilderness takes a dark turn

programme.title: The Simpsons

As the possibility of successful admission becomes more likely, Lisa feels her position as the intelligent one in the family is being threatened

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Ziff Who Came to Dinner
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly takes the blame for his former love rival Artie Ziff's shady financial dealings and business irregularities. Arrested and put on trial, he is shocked to find himself sentenced to 10 years in prison. With the guest voice of Jon Lovitz

programme.title: The Great Australian Bake Off
programme.desc: Cal Wilson and Natalie Tran host as contestants don their aprons and hit the shed in a bid to be crowned Australia's best amateur baker. The judges are Rachel Khoo and Darren Purchese. Twelve keen bakers take on three cake-based challenges - a signature pull-apart cake made up of individually designed cupcakes, a technical passionfruit chiffon cake, and a birthday cake showstopper

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol (2011)
programme.desc: Secret agent Ethan Hunt and his team are implicated in a bombing at the Kremlin, forcing the American president to declare them fugitives. The spies plan to clear their name by abducting the real terrorist, which leads them into a pursuit around the globe. However, Hunt cannot be sure his colleagues are trustworthy. Action adventure sequel, starring Tom Cruise, Jeremy Renner, Simon Pegg and Paula Patton

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 27-year-old flight attendant Alex from Bristol. Having never had a serious relationship, he is hoping to land himself a man for the long haul. He is followed by 26-year-old Laura from Gloucestershire, a horse-loving country girl who is looking for love

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: Hopeful singletons shed their inhibitions at a private villa in Colombia in the hope of finding their soulmate. Reality dating show hosted by Rylan Clark

Also, Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and a couple's relationship might be over before it has begun

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from the north Kent coast compete, with engaged Emma and Craig kicking things off with their menu of simple fare, but the starter isn't popular and there are issues with the dessert. Darren and Dan are next up and their food goes down a storm, while well-to-do Edward and Catherine conclude proceedings, hoping to impress with their grand house and fine dining. Who will take home the £1,000 prize money?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Rosaria bought Bella Luna to realise her son Gianfranco's ambition to become a chef, but the Italian restaurant's future looks bleak due to his lack of experience in the kitchen combined with her refusal to acknowledge the eatery's many flaws. Gordon Ramsay heads to Easton, Pennsylvania, to help the troubled pair and save the business from financial disaster

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The end is nigh for fantasy fan Evan as he plans to wage war on his wedding day. However, his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key family affair. Will this noble groom make his bride feel like a queen, or will Evan's epic Game of Thrones-inspired plan be an epic fail?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tuckers board the train for an eventful journey to Dede's wedding. Claire and Mitchell work on their speech, Phil and Cam are starstruck when they spot their favourite author on the train, Manny and Luke go girl crazy and Gloria finds herself stuck in a frustrating situation. Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All three families trying to cope with their separate holiday experiences, before everyone tries to make their way back home in time for Father's Day. The Dunphys are wrapping up their trip to New York City, while Cam and Mitchell are caring for Cam's dying grandmother in Missouri, and Jay, Gloria and Manny are attending a wedding in Mexico - but all of their respective trips are thrown into turmoil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay tries to make a good impression on his new neighbours, while Cam and Mitchell attempt to teach Lily a message of acceptance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane is on the cards when Homer finds an old film strip, leading to family flashbacks telling the story of Bart and Lisa's troublesome toddler years - and how they got into their first fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family hears about Grampa's time in the Air Force, and when Milhouse's Dutch cousin Annika pops by, Bart takes up smoking to impress her. Featuring the guest voice of Game of Thrones' Carice van Houten

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a modernised Springfield Elementary School has a technical meltdown, Lisa does her best to transform it into a different institution. During the process, Groundskeeper Willie coaches her and the other members of the Mathlympics team for an important maths quiz against their Waverly Hill rivals

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall, Naked and Afraid, BBC News and ITV News. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Wild Isles, Starstruck, The Apprentice, MILF Manor, The Piano and Married at First Sight Australia. They also share their thoughts on an unusual edition Match of the Day, and an ITV News report on Gary Lineker. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: A naked newbie is thrown into the mix, turning heads and threatening budding relationships. Tensions boil and one dater is dumped for good

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Tommy, who decided a wedding on water skis was the way forward, given his bride Hannah's champion experience in the sport

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Boat-dwelling Steven kicks off the competition in East Anglia, accompanied by his partner of 10 years, Lisa, with a Sunday lunch-inspired roast dinner with a fresh fish starter. Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

Narrated by Craig Cash. From November 2021

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: History student Abbie is a descendant of Henry VIII but is hoping to find someone much nicer than her horrible ancestor. Butler Kit wants to meet a man who shares his passion for the royal family, and will football-mad James get the royal seal of approval from Kate Middleton lookalike Jodie?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics settle down with their takeaways to watch Bridgerton, The Apprentice, Secret Genius, The Floor, Pole to Pole with Will Smith and Olivia Attwood: Getting Filthy Rich, while the cameras capture their thoughts and instant reactions

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Gladiators, The Summit, Michael McIntyre's Big Show, Bridgerton, Guy Martin's House Without Bills, Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly and BBC News, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer and Marge are lost in an icy wilderness, they must push themselves to their limits to survive

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. programme.desc: The end is nigh for fantasy fan Evan as he plans to wage war on his wedding day. However, his emotional bride-to-be Zoe wants a low-key family affair. Will this noble groom make his bride feel like a queen, or will Evan's epic Game of Thrones-inspired plan be an epic fail?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta tries to add a touch of romance to an event when he invites his girlfriend Sophia (Eva Longoria) to the precinct's work trip, along with Amy's boyfriend, Teddy (Kyle Bornheimer). Meanwhile, Charles is keen to help Holt with his anniversary breakfast, and Rosa refuses to admit to Terry and Gina that she is unwell. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Doug Judy (Craig Robinson) is returned to custody after scamming Jake and Rosa in a previous encounter, but Captain Holt offers him a plea deal when he reveals he knows the location of a notorious drug dealer. Meanwhile, Gina and Boyle become concerned about their parents' relationship, and Santiago makes Holt a Christmas gift. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Pritchett-Dunphy-Tuckers board the train for an eventful journey to Dede's wedding. Claire and Mitchell work on their speech, Phil and Cam are starstruck when they spot their favourite author on the train, Manny and Luke go girl crazy and Gloria finds herself stuck in a frustrating situation. Meanwhile, Jay seems delighted that Dede has moved on for good, but could his overenthusiasm come back to bite him?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire struggles to find the right moment to sack an employee, while Phil catches Luke in a compromising position at home and everyone fails to notice that Alex has moved back for the summer. Elsewhere, Jay refuses to accept that finding a job again might be harder than he thought and Lily gets caught in the middle when Cameron and Mitch decide to spend the summer apart

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: All three families trying to cope with their separate holiday experiences, before everyone tries to make their way back home in time for Father's Day. The Dunphys are wrapping up their trip to New York City, while Cam and Mitchell are caring for Cam's dying grandmother in Missouri, and Jay, Gloria and Manny are attending a wedding in Mexico - but all of their respective trips are thrown into turmoil

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay tries to make a good impression on his new neighbours, while Cam and Mitchell attempt to teach Lily a message of acceptance

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A trip down memory lane is on the cards when Homer finds an old film strip, leading to family flashbacks telling the story of Bart and Lisa's troublesome toddler years - and how they got into their first fight

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family hears about Grampa's time in the Air Force, and when Milhouse's Dutch cousin Annika pops by, Bart takes up smoking to impress her. Featuring the guest voice of Game of Thrones' Carice van Houten

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a modernised Springfield Elementary School has a technical meltdown, Lisa does her best to transform it into a different institution. During the process, Groundskeeper Willie coaches her and the other members of the Mathlympics team for an important maths quiz against their Waverly Hill rivals

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Another trilogy of spooky stories originally broadcast at Halloween. A Mayan civilisation - with some very familiar-looking members - predicts the end of the world, and a scientific experiment in Springfield ends up lumbering the town with its very own black hole - which threatens to swallow everything and everyone in sight. Finally, a spot of time travel relocates Bart to 1974 for a Back to the Future parody in which he inadvertently jeopardises his parents' relationship

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall, Naked and Afraid, BBC News and ITV News. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Wild Isles, Starstruck, The Apprentice, MILF Manor, The Piano and Married at First Sight Australia. They also share their thoughts on an unusual edition Match of the Day, and an ITV News report on Gary Lineker. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson welcomes two more singletons to choose a date after seeing what their potential partners have to offer on a purely physical level. First up is 25-year-old Hope, a model from Birmingham. A huge wrestling fan, she is keen to find a man who can finally pin her down. She is followed by 28-year-old veterinary student Kurt, a real-life Dr Doolittle who can talk to the animals but gets tongue-tied speaking to women. Will Naked Attraction's unique dating method help him overcome his shyness?

programme.title: Dating Naked UK
programme.desc: A naked newbie is thrown into the mix, turning heads and threatening budding relationships. Tensions boil and one dater is dumped for good

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics review Jamie's £1 Wonders, Married at First Sight Australia, Only Connect, Sex Actually with Alice Levine, Fall, Naked and Afraid, BBC News and ITV News. First shown in March 2023

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. Chief stewardess Aesha is worried that one of her charges might be a bit inexperienced for the high-end superyacht game. Also, on the very first night, there's a jet ski hoisting mishap

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay concludes his visit to Zayna Flaming Grill in Redondo Beach, California, and finds more questions than answers as he tries to save the crisis-ridden restaurant from disaster. While trying to inject some much-needed flavour into the tired Mediterranean menu, the chef also encourages aunt-and-niece duo Faye and Brenda to settle their differences

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to express his feelings for Dana by making her a mix tape, but disaster strikes when the tape falls into Beverly's hands. Barry obtains a fake ID and takes it to school to show off to his classmates. David Spade (Rules of Engagement) guest stars, with Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is disappointed to be cast in a minor role in the school musical, so Beverly helps him to land a leading part in a competing show. Barry falls out with his father when Murray insists on leaving sporting events early to beat the traffic. Ana Gasteyer (Suburgatory) guest stars

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Catching up with groom Tommy, who decided a wedding on water skis was the way forward, given his bride Hannah's champion experience in the sport

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Imran and Leah send shockwaves through the village as they return hand-in-hand. Elsewhere, Cleo seeks encouragement on her first day back at work, and a resident chooses forgiveness

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos on the themes of food and animals

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Boat-dwelling Steven kicks off the competition in East Anglia, accompanied by his partner of 10 years, Lisa, with a Sunday lunch-inspired roast dinner with a fresh fish starter. Day two sees self-confessed snob Justine and partner Ben bring some class to the competition with an Italian themed evening. Finally it's the turn of Rosa and Darren who outsource all their ingredients from Spain

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three restaurants he helped that were among the biggest challenges he faced, finding out whether they stayed on the road to recovery or turned back into nightmares. First he meets sisters Rita and Lisa to see if they have continued serving fresh instead of frozen food at Boston's La Galleria 33, before heading to the Olde Hitching Post in Hanson, Massachusetts, to discover whether controlling owner Tom has kept his promise and handed over the reins to his daughter Andrea. Finally, Gordon goes back to the Prohibition gastro pub in Everett, Washington, to catch up with owner Rishi and learn if she has ditched belly-dancing in favour of running her business

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean
programme.desc: Aboard the Bravado in Barcelona, captain Sandy is assembling her charter season crew and Irishman Nathan is back as her bosun - if he can recover from a bout of food poisoning in time to set sail. programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure

He also heads along the Thames to the village of Bray, home to the Waterside Inn restaurant. Here he catches up with old friends Michel Roux Sr and his son Alain

programme.title: James Martin's Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: On the next leg of his Islands to Highlands tour, James travels to Devon where he meets his friend and Michelin-starred chef Simon Hulstone

programme.title: James Martin's Islands to Highlands
programme.desc: James is joined by friend and Michelin-starred chef Mark Jordan, riding around Jersey on mini motorbikes while exploring the island's culinary delights. James samples one of Jersey's most famous exports - the Jersey Royal potato - which he uses to cook up a squid risotto with a difference. Mark gets a lesson in oyster shucking and James uses Jersey black butter to create a black butter tartlet

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig introduce a special round of the baking challenge in which contestants must create confectionery inspired by the Roaring Twenties. The signature challenge involves a decorative twist on custard pies, while the technical round will be a test of the bakers' timing and consistency. Finally, for the Shows, they must create a three-tiered masterpiece inspired by their tipple of choice. Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith are on hand to assess the results of their efforts and decide who will be leaving the tent

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host dessert week as the baking contest crosses the half-way point. The signature challenge is an elegant and challenging bake with a lot of delicate layers, while the technical round will test the bakers' ability to pull off delicate assembly and precise decoration. Finally, for the showstopper, they must create a spherical celebration cake. Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood are on hand to taste the results - and decide who will be crowned Star Baker and who will be leaving the tent this week

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host a special festival-themed round of the culinary competition. The episode kicks off with a signature challenge in which the bakers must draw inspiration from celebrations across the world. Moving on to the technical round, the contestants find the makings of a classic deep-fried Italian dish lurking beneath the mysterious gingham cloths. Finally, the Showstopper puts the bakers' precision and creativity to the test before judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith decide who will be crowned StarBaker

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig host as the remaining bakers' knowledge of pastry is tested. The Signature challenge is a savoury take on a French classic, there's a multi-layered Moroccan Technical, and a towering Showstopper that requires not only an expertise with pastry, but also a solid grasp of structural engineering. With a place in the semi-final at stake, who will win the coveted Star Baker title from judges Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood?

programme.title: James Martin's Spanish Adventure
programme.desc: The TV chef embarks on a culinary journey through Spain, discovering the history and culture of the country's diverse regions through food. He starts out in San Sebastian, where he tries whole grilled turbot, samples local cider and shops at the fish market. Along the way he cooks hake, lamb, Basque stew and pintxos

programme.title: James Martin's Great British Adventure
programme.desc: Fellow chef Paul Rankin gives James a personal tour of Northern Ireland's capital city - his home town of Belfast - before the duo enjoy a spot of golf. James pitches up his mobile kitchen right on the green to whip up a tasty dish with bacon, scallops and apples with onion rings, and later cooks a Northern Irish classic - beef with champ, charred onions and parsley oil. Next, James is in Craigavon to visit Danni Barry, the first woman named the best chef in Ireland, who rustles up a dessert using local ingredients. Finally, the presenter visits Strangford Lough to fish for langoustines

programme.desc: In Bilbao, James visits a huge indoor food market, takes a funicular to a famous steak restaurant, and sees how La Carolina is made. Later, he heads to a winery on a seabed, before cooking up dishes including squid ink arancini and Basque cheesecake

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge and food writer demonstrates quick and simple recipes designed to take the stress out of cooking for family and friends, as well as sharing some of her memories of her life, family and friends. In the first programme, Mary preparing five dishes suitable for special days and celebrations, including salmon fillets with herbs and red pepper and a side dish of spiralised vegetables and an indulgent treat of lobster tails with aioli and asparagus

programme.title: Mary Berry's Foolproof Cooking
programme.desc: The Great British Bake Off judge prepares a selection of comforting home-cooked dishes, including roast butternut squash soup with cheese and Parma ham twists, mackerel pate with lime, and a warming Mexican tortilla bake. Mary also visits a garlic farm on the Isle of Wight, before returning to the kitchen to make a chicken casserole with garlic and rosemary crushed potatoes, and a creme caramel

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is honouring some of her favourite mums by making sweet deliveries. She starts with strawberry cheesecake brownies for her stepmother

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree is having a night on the town with Ladd, so she's prepping dinner for the kids in advance, making mini meatballs pasta bake and a mixed berry shortcake for dessert

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Dishes include grilled tuna, 'kinda' Nicoise salad, Thai chicken laksa and mildly spiced noodle squash broth as Jamie Oliver continues to demonstrate his own brand of fast food

programme.title: Jamie's 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Lamb Tagine and Chicken Caesar Salad
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates his own brand of fast food, revealing how to prepare lamb tagine, pan-fried aubergine and cumin crunch as well as crispy polenta chicken Caesar salad, each within the space of 15 minutes

programme.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
programme.desc: Tina Fey joins Ina Garten at the barn for a fun-filled day of deep conversation, breakfast custard, and a dream dinner of chicken and potatoes

programme.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
programme.desc: Actor Christine Baranski visits Ina's barn to share Broadway stories and a culinary trip to Italy. They cook Bolognese and roasted broccolini

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye takes pity on Trapper, who is suffering from a cold, and offers him his new long johns - only to find them being passed round the 4077th. Korean War comedy, starring Alan Alda and Wayne Rogers

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A broadcast of the Army-Navy football game is interrupted by a raid which leaves the 4077th with an unexploded bomb in the compound and a surprise message from the CIA. Comedy, starring Alan Alda, Gary Burghoff and Larry Linville

programme.title: The Bounty (1984)
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about the mutiny on board HMS Bounty against Commanding Lieutenant William Bligh. As naval discipline breaks down while docked in Tahiti, the commander resorts to harsh measures to keep the crew in line. However, his seamen respond to his brutality with insurrection, and Bligh and his loyalists are cast adrift in a lifeboat, while the mutineers go in search of a haven safe from retribution. With Mel Gibson, Anthony Hopkins and Laurence Olivier

programme.desc: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.

Josie Lawrence guest stars in the final episode of the series
