programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Former partner Jim Cody asks Hooker to help him crack a drug-related murder, only to find the case has unfortunate personal repercussions. William Shatner and Jim Brown star

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: A recently released convict tries to exact revenge on Hooker, whom he blames for the death of his long-time cellmate. However, Romano gets caught in the crossfire, resulting in damage to his sight and his girlfriend getting killed. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Adrian Zmed

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy poses as a high-class fashion model to catch the killer responsible for murdering two catwalk queens. Heather Locklear and William Shatner star

programme.title: MegaFault (2009)
programme.desc: A series of devastating earthquakes are evidence of a massive crack opening up in the surface of the planet. A seismologist teams up with an explosives expert to prevent the world being completely destroyed by the quakes. Disaster movie, starring Brittany Murphy, Eriq La Salle and Bruce Davison

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The War Lord (1965)
programme.desc: An 11th-century Norman knight is sent by the duke he serves to defend a druid village. Permitted under feudal law, he takes another man's wife, who falls in love with him and has no intention of returning to her husband. However, her vengeful spouse is outraged and ignites a civil war by influencing the knight's brother to turn against him. Medieval drama, with Charlton Heston, Rosemary Forsyth, Richard Boone and Maurice Evans

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf (1961)
programme.desc: An orphan turns into a hairy horror when the moon is full and spreads terror in a Spanish town. Hammer horror, starring Oliver Reed, Clifford Evans, Catherine Feller and Anthony Dawson

programme.title: Night of the Big Heat (1967)
programme.desc: Invaders from outer space take over a remote Scottish island and raise the temperature to an unbearable level, giving residents little or no chance of survival. Sci-fi adventure, starring Christopher Lee, Peter Cushing and Patrick Allen

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid little man is given superhuman strength by a two-headed scientist from Mars

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man dusts off his ancient radio, only to find it mysteriously broadcasts programmes from 20 years ago

programme.title: The International (2009)
programme.desc: An Interpol agent and a district attorney discover a major international bank is involved in a vast range of illegal activities, from insider trading to arms deals and bringing down governments. As they battle to expose the truth, they find the corrupt organisation not only has the law on its side, but will kill to keep the secrets safe. Thriller, starring Clive Owen, Naomi Watts and Armin Mueller-Stahl.

programme.title: Blitz (2011)
programme.desc: An uncompromising police detective's career is under threat when his violent methods are exposed by a reporter. However, he is kept on duty as he is considered the only man capable of stopping an elusive serial killer, one who is preying on police officers. Crime thriller, starring Jason Statham, Aidan Gillen, Paddy Considine and David Morrissey

programme.title: Drive (2011)
programme.desc: A stuntman who moonlights as a getaway driver tries to protect the wife and child of an imprisoned criminal. Upon his release, the convict is forced to rob a pawnshop to pay off his gangland debts, with the driver offering his assistance. However, the job goes awry and the driver is drawn into a conflict with the Mafia. Crime drama, with Ryan Gosling, Carey Mulligan and Bryan Cranston

programme.title: Robin Hood: The Rebellion (2018)
programme.desc: With his true love captured by the villainous Sheriff of Nottingham, the legendary Robin Hood and his crew of outlaws execute a daring rescue to save her. Action adventure, starring Ben Freeman, Brian Blessed, Martyn Ford and Kristian Nairn

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Rangers go undercover in an attempt to stop a group of gangsters unlawfully taking ownership of a nightclub. Chuck Norris stars

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: Stacy poses as a high-class fashion model to catch the killer responsible for murdering two catwalk queens. Heather Locklear and William Shatner star

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Kuroda asks Steve to join a search for a mysterious youth reported to be living with wolves. Sci-fi drama, starring Lee Majors

programme.title: Sinbad and the War of the Furies (2016)
programme.desc: On a treasure hunt gone wrong, modern-day adventurer Sinbad accidentally releases the Furies, three beautiful but terrible ancient beings powerful enough to threaten life on Earth. Action adventure, starring John Hennigan, Jamie Bernadette and Ashley Doris

programme.title: Legend Lowdown

programme.title: Distant Drums (1951)
programme.desc: An army officer mounts a daring raid through the treacherous Florida swamplands. His mission is to take on a group of marauding Seminole rebels, as well as the gun runners who have been supplying them with weapons, and rescue a group of settlers who have been taken hostage by the tribe. Western, starring Gary Cooper, Mari Aldon, Richard Webb, Ray Teal and Arthur Hunnicutt

programme.title: September Gun (1983)
programme.desc: Ageing gunfighter Robert Preston is hired to help a dedicated nun reclaim her mission from the outlaws who have taken it over. However, gang leader Christopher Lloyd gives the unlikely pair plenty of problems. Likeable, old-fashioned Western, also starring Patty Duke and Geoffrey Lewis

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The crew members visit the planet Sigma Iotia II to investigate the disappearance of a Federation starship, and find they have to integrate themselves into a society that mirrors the 1920s gangster era. Sci-fi adventure, starring William Shatner

programme.title: The Six Million Dollar Man
programme.desc: Steve and a female pilot take to the air to investigate a plot to kill a prince. Erik Estrada guest stars

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: Battle: Los Angeles (2011)
programme.desc: The Earth is bombarded by what appear to be meteors, but turn out to be the vanguard of an alien invasion force. As America's west coast comes under heavy attack, a platoon of soldiers is sent in to fight off the aliens and rescue civilians - but the troops have only a few hours to complete their mission before the area is bombed. Sci-fi thriller, with Aaron Eckhart and Ramon Rodriguez

programme.title: Impostor (2002)
programme.desc: A weapons designer comes up with a device to give humanity the edge in their battle against marauding aliens - only to be suspected of being an extraterrestrial android sent to lull the Earthmen into a false sense of security. Sci-fi drama, based on Philip K Dick's short story, starring Gary Sinise, Madeleine Stowe and Vincent D'Onofrio

programme.title: Double Team (1997)
programme.desc: A CIA agent is sent to a top-secret installation after a mission goes wrong, and is told he can never leave. When he realises his pregnant wife is in danger from a terrorist, he escapes and teams up with a flamboyant arms dealer to protect her. Action adventure, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Dennis Rodman and Mickey Rourke

programme.title: The Most Dangerous Game (2022)
programme.desc: A father and son are shipwrecked on a remote island where they are caught up in a trophy hunt held by its mysterious owner, a merciless man who uses the land as an elite hunting preserve for stalking the most dangerous game of all: human. Remake of the 1932 film of the same name. Thriller, starring Chris Tamburello, Casper Van Dien and Judd Nelson.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: T.J. Hooker
programme.desc: The crusading cop gets on the trail of a serial strangler who is targeting homeless women. Vintage American drama, starring William Shatner and Heather Locklear

programme.title: Babylon 5: The Gathering (1993)
programme.desc: The grand opening of a space station comes under threat when someone attempts to sabotage proceedings in ruthless fashion - leaving the commanding officer in the frame for poisoning the Vorlon ambassador. Sci-fi drama which began the series, starring Michael O'Hare, Jerry Doyle and Mira Furlan

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The story of 22-year-old police officer Hazel, who is rushed to St George's after crashing her motorbike while out on a ride with her father. Meanwhile, 86-year-old John is admitted to A&E with a suspected 'triple A' - a ruptured aortic aneurysm in his abdomen, a condition that can be fatal. The doctors must work quickly to diagnose the cause of the internal bleeding, but their investigations reveal further complications. John's children share the story of their father's life, and his surprising secret that sent shockwaves through the family

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics Jas Panesar and Amy Cullen rush to a woman who has had a severe allergic reaction at a restaurant. In Birmingham, paramedics Naomi Whatley and Mark McDonagh attend to a man who has fallen unconscious after a severe diabetic attac, while in Warwick, paramedics treat a man who has collapsed with a suspected heart attack

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that a 95-year-old woman may have suffered life-changing injuries to her hip and internal bleeding after falling down a flight of stairs, while the patient's daughter reflects on her mother's optimistic attitude to life's challenges. Elsewhere, a man knocked off his bike at 40mph may have suffered brain damage. His brother remembers a difficult time that brought them closer together

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: This episode follows the stories of people who have lived through tragic, life-changing events, and explores how these individuals endure with the strength and support of their loved ones. An 86-year-old man is rushed to St Georges by paramedics after a suspected stroke, while an 80-year-old woman is seen by doctors after falling and sustaining an open fracture to her leg. On the paediatric ward, a mother has brought her 14-year-old daughter to see a doctor after she hurt her ankle during gymnastics

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: Ending their tour of north Wales in search of the perfect pitch, the seasoned campers arrive at The Oyster Farm Caravan Site on Anglesey. Marine biologist-turned-campsite host Shaun welcomes the campers with freshly caught oysters and his own oyster gin, before sending them on an aquatic tour of the nearby Puffin Island. The week's winner of the coveted plaque and £2,000 cash prize is then announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition visits the Nottingham and Derby area. American Hali kicks proceeding off with a travel-inspired menu, including Moroccan chicken cigars and an unusual dessert combination. With a very gregarious gathering of guests, the food plays second fiddle to a fun night of impressions, dance moves and kitchen chaos

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in the Nottingham and Derby area. Car salesman Alistair hopes to step the competition up a gear. However, after narrowly avoiding an argument last night with Lesley, the veteran of the group, he's treading on thin ice. And he's serving up a bizarre menu, including chilli soup - for dessert - and prunes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, fun-loving funeral arranger Kim hosts an evening packed with games galore and a mixed bag menu. Fifty-seven-year-old Lesley is again the butt of car salesman Alistair's geriatric jibes and takes great delight in watching him put on the spot during a dance-off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. Can he get his guests begging for an encore, will Alastair and Lesley ever kiss and make up and what will Adam's guests think of his secret hobby as a ufologist?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final soiree in the Nottingham and Derby area sees 57-year-old Lesley counting on a night of glamour and glitz - plus some good home-cooked food - to secure the £1,000 prize. However, before any food is even dished up, the guests make a surprising discovery about the host

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her father Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in inland Andalucía that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine. Utilising the pair's budget of £50,000, Danni lines up five fantastic options to show them

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Ray and Ali seek their dream holiday home in northern Tuscany. Now that Ray is retiring, they're looking to spend time cycling and exploring the great outdoors, as well as enjoying Italian food and wine. The couple have a £180,000 budget to buy a house that's ideally detached, with a large garden and a pool, so call upon the services of property expert Sara Damergi to locate five potential properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Myra and Eric from Glasgow have been holidaying in Portugal for over 20 years, and of all the places they've been, nowhere else has drawn them back year after year like the Silver Coast. Their dream is to spend their retirement in the sunshine. Ben Hillman helps the couple find a suitable property within their budget of £300,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rick and Inge cannot wait to fulfill their dream of buying a holiday home in Tala in western Cyprus, near the beautiful beaches of Coral Bay. The cat-crazy couple ask Jean Johansson to help them find a detached villa for their budget of £260,000, with plenty of space for a feline family and a 'man cave' for Rick's DIY

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Derek and Jane from Lancashire yearn to own a dream property in Chiclana de la Frontera where they can enjoy their very own bit of Spanish sunshine. For their budget of £220,000, they want a property with at least four bedrooms to accommodate all of their grown-up children, plus a private pool. Danni Menzies sets out deliver a splash by delivering the right property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Tuck family in Long Eaton, Derbyshire, who have grown weary of their cramped, three bedroom semi-detached home. Kirstie offers her thoughts on ways the family could change the downstairs of the property, while Phil sets out to find a suitable house they could buy instead

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect is in Stratford-upon-Avon, where he helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their Edwardian mock Tudor house into a modern family home. George also meets Nicki, whose 1920s cottage in Essex needs major changes to make it more accessible

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week begins at the Dog Inn in Longridge, Lancashire, where married couple Stu and Ali hope to impress their guests with a trip to a farm to see some baby lambs. However, an unwelcome discovery during breakfast could throw a spanner in the works

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues at Ullswater View in the Lake District, where Julie and her friend Sarah plan to give the B&Bers a touch of luxury. The group brave wet, windy conditions during a boat trip on the lake, and vibrant views from the breakfast room boost everyone's spirits. Until a sausage causes a problem

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is at String of Horses in Cumbria where hosts Sue and Judith hope their guests enjoy the community feel of the place

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to East Lothian, where husband and wife Gavin and Rosie host at Cove Farm. They're hoping to persuade their guests of the merits of glamping, convincing their guests to embrace the great outdoors with a wood-fired hot tub. However, tensions rise during a trip to a local brewery - and they're not eased by a complaint about the sleeping situation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day finds the B&Bers trying to get their heads around all manner of things, from facilities faults to shoddy sleep scores. After a tension-filled visit last time around, there are plenty of scores to be settled, but whoever will reign supreme when the payments are revealed is anything but certain

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Emma fears for a cyclist who has been trapped under a tram for 15 minutes after a car clipped her wheel and launched her over the handlebars of her bike. A 21-year-old man with a history of sinus issues is bleeding profusely from his nose and the back of his throat, and doctors David and Michael treat a 34-year-old motorbike rider with a badly smashed-up knee

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics in Birmingham try to stop hypothermia from setting in when a woman collapses in the snow. At the same time, Mark and Adi attend to a woman whose waters may have broken at 27 weeks and could be hours away from giving birth. In Coventry, crewmates Neil and Laura treat an elderly man who has a life-threatening infection

programme.desc: Dr Emma fears for a cyclist who has been trapped under a tram for 15 minutes after a car clipped her wheel and launched her over the handlebars of her bike. programme.title: Supermarkets Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team head for the Vegan Aisle for all the news on animal-free food. Helen Lawal visits Tesco to find out how they keep up with all the plant-based burger trend, John Whaite seeks out the secret to the snap in a vegan sausage skin, Kate Quilton finds out how exactly you milk an oat, and Briony May Williams learns how to make a quiche without egg

programme.title: Heir Hunters
programme.desc: After the detectives' hard work, a person visits the home of a relative she didn't know existed, and who surprisingly lives just 10 minutes' from her own house. On another case, the hunters experience a strange sense of déjà vu when they trace heirs to the estate of a woman they have met before, and their search uncovers the remarkable history of Thames bargemen. Plus, details of more unclaimed estates are divulged

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: The lads head to Birmingham, where they fall out over a bench that Henry thinks has value

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Steve and Beverly Green welcome their guests to Centery Farm, Devon, where one contestant decides to keep her past as a hotel inspector secret. The couple's afternoon herding activity is thwarted by heavy rain and fog, and the following morning's feedback showdown has repercussions that will be felt all week

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Professional chef Ben Cooke invites the contestants to the Little Gloster on the Isle of Wight, where he hopes to impress them with a taste of Scandinavian living. Assisted by his 81-year-old grandmother Lillian, who has more than 50 years' experience in the hotel industry, the host splits the visitors into two teams for a contest, but simmering tensions quickly reach boiling-point, resulting in a bitter snub at dinner

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Stephen Hammon hosts the third day of the competition at the four-star Old Hall House B&B in Warwickshire, providing his guests with a variety of on-site activities including shooting and archery before taking them for a meal at his own restaurant. However, he ends up trying too hard to impress at breakfast the next day after Sandie De Rougemont reveals her past as a hotel inspector

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Ex-hotel inspector Sandie De Rougemont, owner of the House of Agnes in Canterbury, plays host. She takes her guests to a local brewery and an upmarket restaurant, where everyone seems to enjoy themselves, but the revelation that a ghost may roam the rooms of the B&B leaves some of the participants nervous

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: This competition takes place in and around Liverpool, where the first to host is 41-year-old taxi business owner Rob, who plans a Scouse-themed evening. The guests he is hoping to impress are 23-year-old fitness fanatic Toria, 44-year-old property developer Christine, 40-year-old South African business woman Sam, and 20-year-old student Inzy

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host in Liverpool, businesswoman Sam, plans a South African-themed evening. However, her food is a bit hit-and-miss on a night full of poor pronunciation, fashion faux pas and a bit of mischief over the main

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gym worker Toria hosts the third party in Liverpool, and hopes a kissing game around the dinner table, along with her flaky flapjacks, will be enough to secure the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Undergraduate Inzy is the fourth host in Liverpool, and he is on a mission to prove students really can cook. The flirting between him and Toria continues, but will he allow love to stand in way of the competition?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, property developer Christine plans to wow her guests with a Spanish holiday-themed dinner party. However, the mood is rather more feisty than fiesta as on-going tensions finally come to a head and it's not long before the honesty - and the sparks - begin to fly

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at North Bridge Street B&B in Hawick in the Scottish Borders, which is run by Eileen Walsh and her Portuguese partner Emanuel Forte. When the guests arrive, the purple-themed rooms cause a reaction, while one competitor's constant criticising irritates another

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest continues at the Golden Fleece in Ruleholme, Cumbria, run by chef Robert Cowan and his partner, Sylvia Spark. Before long, guests Eileen and Emmanuel pick up on cleanliness issues, and breakfast proves to be a disappointment

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants travel to the Bubble Inn in Stenson, Derbyshire for the third day of the competition, where unsightly stains and security leave some of them less than impressed. Manager and ex-semi-professional boxer Connie Eleftheriou is keen to take his rivals in the ring with him, however the real damage happens when Emmanuel is taken to hospital after some overenthusiastic dancing at a Greek-themed night

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Melinda Beckett-Hughes is the final host of the week at Ayuda House in Greater Manchester - and as she has spent the week picking fault, the guests expect perfection from her. However, Robert and Sylvia are shocked to find a dirty towel in a drawer, while Emmanuel and Eileen cannot believe the levels of dust and Connie is horrified by the carpet

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners meet for the last time to find out what they have been paid and settle some old scores. Eileen and Emmanuel from North Bridge Street want to get to the bottom of Melinda and Stewart's dirty bin comments as well as challenging Melinda's shower issues. Robert and Sylvia from the Golden Fleece try to defend their breakfast disaster, but also pull Eileen and Emmanuel up on their low score

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp goes property hunting in the trendy suburb of Heaton in Newcastle, to help Tom and Liz find a new home as they are tired of renting flats. Elsewhere, Phil Spencer is in the Tyne Valley searching for a family home for couple Michael and Sorrel, who only have two months left in their current rental property

programme.title: PopMaster TV
programme.desc: Ken Bruce puts another five players through their paces in the seventh heat, as they face the toughest music questions

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A woman is airlifted to hospital after falling off her mobility scooter and getting knocked unconscious. Her daughter and husband discuss how she has led an active life despite being diagnosed with a crippling illness at a young age. A 78-year-old man is rushed into A&E after falling down the stairs, and doctors fear he may have a bleed on his brain

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The wife, mother and daughters of a man who has been hit by a car wait for news from the doctors of whether he has suffered internal injuries, including a bleed on the brain. Other patients include a man who has cut off four of his toes mowing the lawn, and a three-year-old boy who has suffered a seizure

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to save a grandmother with severe osteoporosis who fell down the stairs carrying her four-month-old grandson. In Warwick, a concerned member of the public calls emergency services to a suspected cardiac arrest but ends up becoming the patient himself. Plus, Neil Vann and Laura Perkins give life-saving treatment to an elderly man found unconscious face down in his hallway

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. With a very gregarious gathering of guests, the food plays second fiddle to a fun night of impressions, dance moves and kitchen chaos

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition continues in the Nottingham and Derby area. Car salesman Alistair hopes to step the competition up a gear. However, after narrowly avoiding an argument last night with Lesley, the veteran of the group, he's treading on thin ice. And he's serving up a bizarre menu, including chilli soup - for dessert - and prunes

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Nottingham, fun-loving funeral arranger Kim hosts an evening packed with games galore and a mixed bag menu. Fifty-seven-year-old Lesley is again the butt of car salesman Alistair's geriatric jibes and takes great delight in watching him put on the spot during a dance-off

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Customer relations associate and part-time drag queen Adam plans a theatrical night of flamboyance as the culinary competition continues in the Derby and Nottingham area. Can he get his guests begging for an encore, will Alastair and Lesley ever kiss and make up and what will Adam's guests think of his secret hobby as a ufologist?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final soiree in the Nottingham and Derby area sees 57-year-old Lesley counting on a night of glamour and glitz - plus some good home-cooked food - to secure the £1,000 prize. However, before any food is even dished up, the guests make a surprising discovery about the host

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Poppy and her father Philip realise their dream of finding a holiday home in inland Andalucía that all the family can use to enjoy the Spanish sunshine. Utilising the pair's budget of £50,000, Danni lines up five fantastic options to show them

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Engaged couple Ray and Ali seek their dream holiday home in northern Tuscany. Now that Ray is retiring, they're looking to spend time cycling and exploring the great outdoors, as well as enjoying Italian food and wine. The couple have a £180,000 budget to buy a house that's ideally detached, with a large garden and a pool, so call upon the services of property expert Sara Damergi to locate five potential properties for them to consider

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Myra and Eric from Glasgow have been holidaying in Portugal for over 20 years, and of all the places they've been, nowhere else has drawn them back year after year like the Silver Coast. Their dream is to spend their retirement in the sunshine. Ben Hillman helps the couple find a suitable property within their budget of £300,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Rick and Inge cannot wait to fulfill their dream of buying a holiday home in Tala in western Cyprus, near the beautiful beaches of Coral Bay. The cat-crazy couple ask Jean Johansson to help them find a detached villa for their budget of £260,000, with plenty of space for a feline family and a 'man cave' for Rick's DIY

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Derek and Jane from Lancashire yearn to own a dream property in Chiclana de la Frontera where they can enjoy their very own bit of Spanish sunshine. For their budget of £220,000, they want a property with at least four bedrooms to accommodate all of their grown-up children, plus a private pool. Danni Menzies sets out deliver a splash by delivering the right property

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet the Tuck family in Long Eaton, Derbyshire, who have grown weary of their cramped, three bedroom semi-detached home. Kirstie offers her thoughts on ways the family could change the downstairs of the property, while Phil sets out to find a suitable house they could buy instead

programme.title: George Clarke's Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect is in Stratford-upon-Avon, where he helps Laura and Jonnie to transform their Edwardian mock Tudor house into a modern family home. George also meets Nicki, whose 1920s cottage in Essex needs major changes to make it more accessible

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week begins at the Dog Inn in Longridge, Lancashire, where married couple Stu and Ali hope to impress their guests with a trip to a farm to see some baby lambs. However, an unwelcome discovery during breakfast could throw a spanner in the works

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition continues at Ullswater View in the Lake District, where Julie and her friend Sarah plan to give the B&Bers a touch of luxury. The group brave wet, windy conditions during a boat trip on the lake, and vibrant views from the breakfast room boost everyone's spirits. Until a sausage causes a problem

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is at String of Horses in Cumbria where hosts Sue and Judith hope their guests enjoy the community feel of the place

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The week's final visit is to East Lothian, where husband and wife Gavin and Rosie host at Cove Farm. They're hoping to persuade their guests of the merits of glamping, convincing their guests to embrace the great outdoors with a wood-fired hot tub. However, tensions rise during a trip to a local brewery - and they're not eased by a complaint about the sleeping situation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment day finds the B&Bers trying to get their heads around all manner of things, from facilities faults to shoddy sleep scores. programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Dr Emma fears for a cyclist who has been trapped under a tram for 15 minutes after a car clipped her wheel and launched her over the handlebars of her bike. programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: A 74-year-old man is brought in after being found in a confused state by his son. Doctors discover signs of a brain injury, leading his children to reveal the tragedy that befell their father and the shattering effect it has had on his life. A woman who fell down the stairs at her granddaughter's 16th birthday is also in need of treatment, and her daughter is reminded of a phone call that changed their lives forever. Meanwhile, in paediatrics, a talkative nine-year-old is treated for a rash on his ankle

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: The story of 22-year-old police officer Hazel, who is rushed to St George's after crashing her motorbike while out on a ride with her father. Meanwhile, 86-year-old John is admitted to A&E with a suspected 'triple A' - a ruptured aortic aneurysm in his abdomen, a condition that can be fatal. The doctors must work quickly to diagnose the cause of the internal bleeding, but their investigations reveal further complications. John's children share the story of their father's life, and his surprising secret that sent shockwaves through the family

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulance crews respond to headteacher Andy who has collapsed after a cardiac arrest in Essex and warehouse employee Rob who is trapped under a pallet of granite in Ipswich. programme.title: Plunderer: The Life and Times of a Nazi Art Thief
programme.desc: Part one of two. Jonathan Petropoulos investigates the life of former Nazi art dealer Bruno Lohse, who became Hermann Göring's personal collector, tasked with finding desirable works of art. After the Second World War, Lohse spent a brief time in prison but later resumed his career as a dealer, often trading in art looted during the conflict

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn relive the golden age of steam. They begin by exploring how the introduction of steam railways in the early 19th century created a domestic revolution, from the way people lived to the food they ate. Arriving at Ffestiniog Railway in Snowdonia, they find out how millions of tons of slate were moved down the mountain, while underground, Alex experiences the brutal conditions face by miners in the Llechwedd Quarry

programme.title: Battlefield America
programme.desc: Charting the pivotal battles of the American Civil War, underscoring their impact on the broader conflict and on American history. Beginning by examining the strategic decision made by Union and Confederate leaders and the intense combat experienced by soldiers at the battles of Shiloh and Antietam. Part one of three

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag
programme.desc: German women may be perceived as passive witnesses to the horrific crimes committed by the Nazi regime. However, as this documentary reveals many were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. The first of two episodes begins with Hitler's arrival in power in 1933 and goes back to the roots of the indoctrination of young German girls within the female branch of the Hitler Youth (BDM)

programme.title: Women Under Hitler's Flag
programme.desc: Part two of two. The German women who were active participants that were as brutal and merciless as their better-known, male counterparts. In 1942, a new phase of the genocide took place - the 'Final Solution'. Man women, far from being mere witnesses or accomplices, played a role as important as it was deadly

programme.title: Plunderer: The Life and Times of a Nazi Art Thief
programme.desc: Part two of two. Jonathan Petropoulos investigates Nazi art dealer Bruno Lohse's life in post-war America. Dealing in looted art, he became an invisible hand, even as the original owners' families sought the return of works rightfully theirs. Featuring an archive interviews with Lohse himself, as well as curators, investigators and descendants of the victims of Nazi art theft

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn continue to relive the golden age of steam and how the Victorian railways created modern Britain. They visit Beamish in County Durham, learning how the rail companies first realised there was money to be made in moving people rather than commodities. Then Peter and Alex live the life of navvies, the men who built the thousands of miles of tracks in all weather conditions, and Ruth finds out what impact the new railroads had on the cottage industries. She also learns about the role of the guard, and the trio learn what precautions were necessary for taking a long journey on a train that was yet to include the necessary facilities

programme.title: Masters: Keepers of Tradition
programme.desc: The work of thatcher Marika Leen. She came from the Netherlands as a teenager, climbed onto a leaking roof in rural Galway on the instructions of three old bachelors below, and never really came down. Forty-five years later, she is one of Ireland's finest thatchers. In this edition, Marika returns to Inis Oírr to re-thatch the last thatched cottage on the island

programme.desc: The return of the programme featuring mixture of traditional folk songs and original material performed by Irish musicians at notable locations around the country. programme.title: Duffy's Pub
programme.desc: US actor Patrick Duffy, a third-generation Irishman, has always been fascinated by the communities that develop around their local pub, so he travels to Ireland to see for himself how bars have evolved and changed. Along with his partner, the actress Linda Purl, Patrick visits many Duffy's Pubs and other legendary boozers across Dublin, Galway, Donegal, Mayo and Tipperary, to explore pub culture and the changes it has undergone over the years. He ends his journey in his ancestral home of Kilmovee, Mayo, where his grandfather, also Patrick, lived before leaving for a new life in Montana

programme.title: Uncharted with Ray Goggins
programme.desc: Singer Keith Duffy is venturing to Uganda with his actor son Jay for the test of a lifetime. Father and son will attempt to summit one of Africa's highest and least climbed peaks in the Rwenzori Mountains alongside Ray Goggins. It's a long and gruelling ascent of seven days through knee deep bog and alpine rock to its glacier peak, making it one of the continents toughest expeditions

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Chaquie helps Rachel get ready for an important event for Anna. On the way, Celine and Rachel stop by the Walsh house - only to discover Anna is missing. Also, after an argument between the sisters, a quiet moment of unity pulls them back together

programme.desc: Great Slaughter's twinning with a German town is met with animosity by some members of the twinning committee and townsfolk. programme.title: Louis Theroux: The Settlers
programme.desc: Fourteen years after his first visit to the West Bank, Louis spends time with the growing community of Israeli religious-nationalist settlers, who since the Hamas-led attacks of October 7. 2023, have been expanding their areas of control by pursuing a campaign of violence against local Palestinian communities. He meets prominent settlers, including the 'godmother' of the movement Daniella Weiss, and travels throughout the territory in an attempt to understand the consequences of their activity

programme.title: The Sunday Game Live
programme.desc: Cork v Limerick (Throw-in 2.00pm). Joanne Cantwell presents all the action from the Munster Senior Hurling Championship final at SuperValu Páirc Uí Chaoimh. These teams also met in the 2025 final, with Cork prevailing to lift this trophy for a record-extending 55th time and end Limerick's run of six consecutive triumphs in the competition

programme.title: Scannal 20 Bliain
programme.desc: Garry Mac Donncha presents a look back at sporting scandals, including Lansdowne Road football riot of 1995 when English hooligans ripped up the stadium, and the controversy that exploded after Thierry Henry's handball in a World Cup play-off in Paris in 2009. With contributions from sports broadcasters Seán Bán Breathnach, Cárthach Bán Breathnach, Gráinne McElwain and Cuán Ó Flatharta

programme.desc: Victoria and Patel run into fish and game officers while they're on a call, while there are reports of an aggressive attack dog on the loose

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: A Springfield Summer Christmas for Christmas
programme.desc: Despite disliking festive movies, producer Mary Tannenbaum comes to shoot a Christmas film in Springfield, and Lisa decides to make a behind-the-scenes documentary when Mary stays with her family. programme.title: Watercolour Challenge

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A girl who is followed by a stranger seeks shelter with a kindly woman, but her troubles are far from over. Alfred Burke and Stephanie Cole star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: The Orderly World of Mr Appleby
programme.desc: A woman learns her husband has killed off his three previous wives - forcing her to outwit him or become his next victim. Robert Lang and Elizabeth Spriggs star

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A woman consults an attorney about her husband, whom she believes is a murderer

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man is persuaded to challenge his wife's lover to a duel after being told that he would get special treatment in court under California law if he killed him that way

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American star of stage and screen, whose films include Ferris Bueller's Day Off, The Producers, WarGames, Glory , The Cable Guy, Godzilla and Election

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Art historian Siân Walters and writer James Payne explore masterpieces, delving into the stories behind the canvas of the world's most famous paintings. They beginning with Edvard Munch's The Scream, uncovering how anxiety, raw emotion and the fragile, ever-decaying nature of his paintings came together to create one of the most haunting works in history

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Siân Walters and James Payne explore Vincent van Gogh's The Starry Night, looking at how a turbulent mind, a bold vision, and a small view from an asylum window contributed to the creation of one of the most famous paintings in history

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man plots to kill his overweight wife, but his ingenious plan goes awry. Drama, with John Castle, Sheila Gish and Miriam Margolyes

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A philandering physician who has an obsession for orchids cultivates a deadly plot to see off his wife. Siân Phillips and Richard Johnson star

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A man takes his son to a magic shop on his birthday and watches as the store owner makes the boy vanish. The youngster comes back later with supernatural powers and evil intentions. Short drama, starring Leslie Nielsen

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.sub-title: Queen - A Night at the Opera
programme.desc: The story behind the conception and recording of Queen's fourth album A Night at the Opera, which was released in 1975. Containing songs such as You're My Best Friend and Bohemian Rhapsody, the record transformed the group's career. The programme features interviews, acoustic performances and archive footage

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor

programme.title: Portrait Artist of the Year
programme.sub-title: Eddie Hall, Jodie Kidd & James Purefoy

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A swindler buys a painting from a sweet old lady, but gets less than he bargained for. Drama, starring Bill Maynard and Jesse Matthews

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents

programme.title: André Rieu: Romantic Paradise

programme.title: Gods of the Game
programme.desc: A Grange Park Opera production telling the story of two childhood friends and football stars who join forces to front their nation's bid to host the World Cup tournament. As their campaign takes shape, they begin to encounter a nefarious world of bribery and corruption, overseen by the game's charismatic and all-powerful president. With comedian Lee Mack as the commentator

programme.title: Academy of Ancient Music: Vivaldi's Four Seasons
programme.desc: Violinist Rachel Podger joins the Academy of Ancient Music for a performance of Vivaldi's most popular work, featuring the sounds of wintry blizzards and hazy summer days

programme.title: The Lion in Winter (1968)
programme.desc: The ageing Henry II is coming to the end of his life and must choose one of his three surviving sons to inherit the throne. He summons all three, his wife Eleanor, his mistress and the king of France, to join him during a bleak Christmas in 1183, where all parties conspire to achieve the outcome they desire. Oscar-winning historical drama, with Peter O'Toole, Katharine Hepburn, Anthony Hopkins and Timothy Dalton

programme.title: Jacqueline du Pré: Genius and Tragedy
programme.desc: A celebration of the enigmatic British cellist, whose career was cruelly curtailed by multiple sclerosis when she was just twenty-eight years old. Narrated by Yo-Yo Ma

programme.title: 50 Years on Film: David Hockney
programme.desc: Using clips from more than half a century of archive footage, this film looks back at the life and career of David Hockney, one of Britain's greatest artists

programme.desc: Maeve and Caleb search for answers, Christina investigates Peter Myers, and William announces a new Delos venture

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyone's a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Regime
programme.desc: In an attempt to undermine the chancellor, Nicholas teams up with Laskin, Schiff and Singer. Meanwhile, Elena negotiates a deal with Senator Holt

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Maeve and Caleb search for answers, Christina investigates Peter Myers, and William announces a new Delos venture

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: First episode of the drama set in a lawless US town in the aftermath of Little Big Horn, where everyone's a gold digger, from hopeful prospectors to the saloon hookers. Former Montana marshal Seth Bullock relocates to a gold-mining camp known as Deadwood in Dakota Territory, looking to start a hardware business with his partner, Sol Star. Starring Ian McShane as ruthless saloon owner Al Swearengen, Timothy Olyphant as store manager Seth Bullock and Molly Parker as Alma Garrett

programme.title: Deadwood
programme.desc: Calamity Jane and Doc Cochran care for the little girl who survived the massacre, as suspicions arise that the Indians may not have been to blame. Hickok asks Bullock for protection in a high-stakes poker game, and Tom Mason is determined to exact his revenge. Starring Ian McShane, Timothy Olyphant and Nick Offerman

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: It is Easter morning 1883 and Bertha Russell receives news that her bid for a box at the Academy of Music has been rejected. The return of the period drama, starring Carrie Coon and Louisa Jacobson

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: Peggy gets welcomed back to 61st Street by almost everyone, while George informs Oscar of his decision and sends Clay to meet with union leader Mr Henderson at his steel mill

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: On his journey to a forthcoming tournament in Ashford, Ser Duncan the Tall meets a clever young boy named Egg, who offers to be his squire. Fantasy prequel set a century before the events of Game of Thrones, starring Peter Claffey and Dexter Sol Ansell

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: Dunk appeals to various lords in order to gain entrance into the tournament, but Egg advises him to hold on to his pride. When the Targaryens arrive at Ashford, Dunk seizes his moment with Prince Baelor

programme.title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
programme.desc: After Egg attempts to train Dunk's stubborn horse, the knight teaches his new squire an important skill. As they take in the tourney's first full day of events, Dunk receives a proposition from the Ashford steward that could help secure his future

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah eagerly anticipates trying out her new material on the road as Ava dreads the potential fallout of her explosive email. Meanwhile, Jimmy attempts to put out fires

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Deborah embraces tour life, Ava grapples with the value of honesty, while Jimmy learns the harsh realities of Hollywood dealmaking. Comedy, starring Jean Smart

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Ava tries to adapt a new lifestyle, while Deborah continues to workshop her material on the road. Meanwhile, reeling from the sudden emptiness of life without Wilson, Marcus makes a rash decision

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When a booking mishap lands her on the wrong cruise, Deborah struggles to connect with her audience. Marcus sees the effects of burning the candle at both ends

programme.title: The Gilded Age
programme.desc: The opera war escalates, there is a surprise guest at Bertha's fundraiser, and Peggy offers to cover the Tuskegee story. Ada hosts a luncheon for Mr Forte, George woos Henderson and Watson mulls over a proposal

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss gets a surprise which could alter his holiday plans, while Ballard and Gharty investigate the death of an HIV positive man and Munch is at loggerheads with his ex-wife. Cop drama, starring Yaphet Kotto and Peter Gerety

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Bayliss and Pembleton face up to deep-rooted prejudices while investigating the murder of a gay philanthropist. Meanwhile, detectives Kellerman, Stivers and Lewis decide to confront Georgia Rae Mahoney about the video

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Falsone investigate the baffling case of a man found lynched, while Pembleton is puzzled to see Bayliss flirting with Detective Ballard

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: The cameras follow three teams of fishermen participating in Brixham's annual Trawler Race, including a father and son who have been pitted against each other. Landlady Pat Seddon is not looking forward to the raucous celebrations, however, and decides to reminisce about past race days instead. The programme also meets Matt Kimble, a graduate who gave up on his plan to become a PE teacher and decided to follow his ancestors into the fishing trade instead

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Brixham relives its glory days by hosting a vintage ships race and heritage festival, and a local toy-shop owner faces a difficult decision

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Lewis and Falsone investigate the baffling case of a man found lynched, while Pembleton is puzzled to see Bayliss flirting with Detective Ballard

programme.title: Homicide: Life on the Street
programme.desc: Georgia Rae Mahoney makes more enemies in the homicide squad, and pushes one of them too far. Dr Cox recounts an odd story

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: Ava tries to adapt a new lifestyle, while Deborah continues to workshop her material on the road. Meanwhile, reeling from the sudden emptiness of life without Wilson, Marcus makes a rash decision

programme.title: Hacks
programme.desc: When a booking mishap lands her on the wrong cruise, Deborah struggles to connect with her audience. Marcus sees the effects of burning the candle at both ends

programme.title: Captain Phillips (2013)
programme.desc: An American cargo ship sets a dangerous course around the coast of Somalia, while inland, four men are pressed into service as pirates by the local warlords. The captain is taken hostage when the raiding party hijacks the vessel, resulting in a tense five-day crisis. Fact-based thriller, starring Tom Hanks and Barkhad Abdi

programme.title: Hannibal (2001)
programme.desc: Fugitive serial killer Dr Hannibal Lecter has gone into hiding as an academic in Italy, but a disfigured victim is determined to find him and inflict a gruesome revenge. FBI agent Clarice Starling is once again drawn into the doctor's deadly orbit as she finds herself being used as bait for the avenger's trap. Ridley Scott's thriller sequel, starring Anthony Hopkins, Julianne Moore, Gary Oldman and Ray Liotta

programme.title: True Romance (1993)
programme.desc: A shy clerk marries a hooker and kills her pimp, and together they go on the run to Los Angeles with $5million of cocaine they plan to sell. However, the drugs belong to the Mob and hitmen are soon on their trail. Tony Scott's thriller, written by Quentin Tarantino and starring Christian Slater, Patricia Arquette, Dennis Hopper, Gary Oldman, Val Kilmer, Brad Pitt and Christopher Walken

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2 (1989)
programme.desc: Headstrong cop Martin Riggs and his cautious partner Roger Murtaugh stumble across a plot by a South African diplomat to launder drugs money by shipping gold coins into the US via his embassy. Protected by diplomatic immunity, the crook looks certain to evade the law - while his chief henchman has a connection to Riggs' traumatic past. Action thriller sequel, with Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci, Joss Ackland, Derrick O'Connor and Patsy Kensit

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefact's twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jackson's fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: Sinners (2025)
programme.desc: Hoping to escape their troubled pasts, twin brothers return to their hometown to start over, only to find an even darker force waiting to welcome them back. Writer/director Ryan Coogler's Oscar-winning horror thriller, starring Michael B Jordan, Miles Caton and Saul Williams

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Anderson's Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchon's novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers' version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: True Romance (1993)
programme.desc: A shy clerk marries a hooker and kills her pimp, and together they go on the run to Los Angeles with $5million of cocaine they plan to sell. However, the drugs belong to the Mob and hitmen are soon on their trail. Tony Scott's thriller, written by Quentin Tarantino and starring Christian Slater, Patricia Arquette, Dennis Hopper, Gary Oldman, Val Kilmer, Brad Pitt and Christopher Walken

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange (1971)
programme.desc: Sadistic young gang leader Alex leads a carefree life indulging his love of rape, violence and classical music. When he is finally arrested, he is subjected to a sinister form of aversion therapy that brainwashes him into being physically unable to use violence. However, on his release, he finds friends and family have turned on him, while others seek to exploit him to further their political ends. Drama, starring Malcolm McDowell and Warren Clarke

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 3 (1992)
programme.desc: As Murtagh counts down his last few days on the force before retirement, he and Riggs go on the trail of a former LAPD officer who is using his insider knowledge to steal confiscated weaponry and ammunition, then selling it on to criminal gang bosses. The duo are assigned to work with internal affairs investigator Lorna Cole, while they also get help from old friend - and reformed small-time crook - Leo Getz. Action thriller sequel, starring Mel Gibson, Danny Glover, Joe Pesci and Rene Russo

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Nosferatu (2024)
programme.desc: In 1838 Germany, Thomas Hutter is sent to the Carpathian mountains to secure the signature of enigmatic nobleman Count Orlok on a property sale in the German city of Wisborg. Thomas leaves his bride Ellen in the care of friend Friedrich Harding and his wife Anna. The young man barely survives the exhausting trip to Europe and stumbles home to find Ellen driven to delirium by a telepathic bond to the Count. Director Robert Eggers' version of the Dracula-inspired horror, starring Bill Skarsgard, Lily-Rose Depp, Nicholas Hoult and Aaron Taylor-Johnson

programme.title: Promising Young Woman (2020)
programme.desc: Medical-school dropout Cassie is traumatised by a tragic event in her past. Still living with her parents, and waiting tables at a cheap coffee shop to earn a living, she has found the perfect way to deal with the painful past, and seeks vengeance against those who crossed her path. Director Emerald Fennell's Oscar-winning crime thriller, starring Carey Mulligan, Bo Burnham and Alison Brie

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (2026)
programme.desc: Catherine Earnshaw is raised by her alcoholic father at a Yorkshire farmhouse, with Nelly Dean as a constant companion. Mr Earnshaw 'acquires' an orphaned boy named Heathcliff during one of his gallivants and gifts the waif to Cathy as her pet. The children become inseparable, and as adults they embark on a destructive relationship. Writer-director Emerald Fennell's drama based on Emily Bronte's romance, starring Margot Robbie, Jacob Elordi and Martin Clunes

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle (1993)
programme.desc: A widowed father is coping badly with his wife's death, but his son is convinced that what he really needs is some new romance in his life. He arranges for his dad to go on a radio phone-in show, and his touching story moves a reporter to respond, even though she is already engaged. She returns to her fiance, but the boy, certain she is the woman for his father, plots to bring them together. Romantic comedy, with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey (2025)
programme.desc: New York bachelor David is due to drive to his friend's wedding, but a wheel clamp on his vehicle derails those plans. He acquires a new drive from the mysterious Car Rental Company managed by two nameless agents, who are oddly familiar with his dating history. At the wedding, David meets fellow singleton Sarah and squanders an opportunity to dance with her. On the way home, the rental car's GPS asks him if he would like to embark on a big bold beautiful journey. When David agrees, the virtual assistant guides him to Sarah and they follow a winding route between physical doors that open into episodes from their respective pasts. Romantic drama, starring Colin Farrell and Margot Robbie

programme.title: Mulholland Drive (2001)
programme.desc: An actress arrives home to find a mysterious woman in her room who is suffering from amnesia. She sets out with the stranger to discover how she got there - but the trail quickly leads to intrigue, blackmail and murder. David Lynch's mystery, starring Naomi Watts, Justin Theroux, Laura Harring and Robert Forster

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Miller's action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

programme.title: The Equalizer (2014)
programme.desc: A retired secret agent applies his talents to the task of helping victims of injustice. When he witnesses a prostitute being beaten up by a pimp, he kills the man, an act that draws him into a battle to the death with a Russian crime syndicate. Action thriller based on the 1980s TV series, starring Denzel Washington and Chloe Grace Moretz

programme.title: Ferrari (2023)
programme.desc: During the summer of 1957, ex-racecar driver Enzo Ferrari is in crisis. Bankruptcy stalks the company he and his wife, Laura, built from nothing a decade earlier. Their tempestuous marriage struggles with the mourning for one son and the acknowledgement of another. Attempting to secure their survival, he rolls the dice on one race - 1,000 miles across Italy, the iconic Mille Miglia. Director Michael Mann's drama, starring Adam Driver and Jack O'Connell

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married (1986)
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor

programme.title: Lost in Translation (2003)
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi

programme.title: One Last Deal (2026)
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent scrambles to land one last high-stakes deal for his star client, with both their futures on the line. Drama, starring Danny Dyer and Elliott Rogers

programme.title: The Plague (2025)
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp as his anxiety spirals into psychological turmoil over the summer. Thriller, starring Joel Edgerton and Everett Blunck

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie (2025)
programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

programme.title: The Internship (2026)
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, the Internship, to violently destroy the organisation. Thriller, starring Lizzy Greene, Megan Boone and Sky Katz

programme.title: The Running Man (2025)
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards enters a deadly televised competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins. Director Edgar Wright's comedy thriller based on the Stephen King story, starring Glen Powell, Lee Pace and Josh Brolin

programme.title: Fuze (2026)
programme.desc: An unexploded Second World War bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation. Drama, starring Aaron Taylor-Johnson, Theo James, Gugu Mbatha-Raw and Sam Worthington

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire (2026)
programme.desc: Tony Kiritsis is convinced mortgage broker ML Hall cheated him out of profits from a land development deal and he vows revenge. Tony walks into a branch of the Meridian Mortgage company for a meeting with ML, only to find his target is on holiday and the appointment will be with ML's son Richard instead. Regardless, Tony reveals a shotgun and holds Richard hostage for his father's supposed crimes. Director Gus Van Sant's thriller, starring Bill Skarsgård, Al Pacino and Dacre Montgomery

programme.title: Sisu: Road To Revenge (2025)
programme.desc: During the Second World War, Finland reluctantly cedes territory to the invading Red Army. Former Army commando Aatami Korpi is among the affected and returns to his family plot to deconstruct his timber-framed home and relocate the wooden beams on a truck across the new border separating the Soviet Union and Finland. The legend of the 'the man who refuses to die' remains a thorn in the side of the Soviet army, and a nameless KGB officer agrees to liberate high-ranking brute Igor Draganov from a Siberian prison in exchange for killing Aatami. Finnish action sequel, starring Jorma Tommila, Stephen Lang and Richard Brake

programme.title: One Last Deal (2026)
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent scrambles to land one last high-stakes deal for his star client, with both their futures on the line. Drama, starring Danny Dyer and Elliott Rogers

programme.title: The Bride! (2026)
programme.desc: In 1930s Chicago, maverick scientist Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change. Writer/director Maggie Gyllenhaal's horror based on The Bride of Frankenstein, starring Jessie Buckley, Christian Bale and Annette Bening

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: Cameron Cade is predicted to be the next great quarterback of American football. During a night-time training session, he suffers a traumatic brain injury. Cameron agrees to attend a week-long boot camp run by retiring star quarterback Isaiah White at his secluded desert compound. However, Cade's life soon turns into a nightmare. Supernatural horror, starring Marlon Wayans and Tyriq Withers

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition is about the race against time. From a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.desc: When Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera, the youngster embarks on a adventure to reunite the Gabby Cats and retrieve her beloved diorama before it's too late. Comedy adventure, starring Laila Lockhart Kraner and Kristen Wiig

programme.title: We Bury the Dead (2024)
programme.desc: When an experimental military weapon accidentally devastates Tasmania, volunteers travel to the island to help authorities identify the dead. Among them is a Ava Newman, who secretly hopes to find her missing husband. However, some of the bodies seem to be returning to life. Horror, starring Daisy Ridley, Brenton Thwaites and Mark Coles Smith

programme.title: Tafiti - Across The Desert (2025)
programme.desc: A young meerkat's grandpa is bitten by a snake, so he sets off to find a magical flower for the cure. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Cosima Henman, Steve Hudson and Kathleen Renish

programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: On July 1, 2000, eight-year-old Sarah Payne went missing while playing in a field near her grandparents' home in West Sussex, and her disappearance prompted a nationwide search. On July 17, her body was found near Pulborough, and soon after convicted paedophile Roy Whiting was charged with her abduction and murder. In this documentary, Sara Payne relives the day her daughter went missing and recounts the horror and agonising days that unfolded in its wake. She also speaks about her fight to change the system in the UK so parents could find out if a child sex offender was living in their area

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise & Fall of the Nazis

programme.title: Combat Ships

programme.title: Instruments of Death

programme.title: Mysteries from Above
programme.desc: A Turkish drought reveals a long-lost ancient Basilica and its secrets. A church spire punches through the surface of a toxic sludge in Romania, while the hull of a massive ship in the North Sea answers decades-old questions

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The story of Travis Walton, who claims that in 1975 he was taken aboard a space ship inhabited by extraterrestrial beings. Plus, an analysis of the the Hebrew Bible, which is filled with stories of abductions by otherworldly beings

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Documentary series following the events that led to some of the country's most heinous crimes, continuing with doctor Harold Shipman. The general practitioner was convicted of murdering 15 patients in January 2000, though it is believed he may have killed up to 250 during his career

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: In 1996, two girls and their mother enjoying a walk in the Kent countryside were the victims of a frenzied hammer attack by Michael Stone, who left them for dead. Lin Russell and her six-year-old daughter Megan died from their injuries, but nine-year-old Josie survived and made a remarkable recovery. This film examines the events surrounding the murders and features interviews with Shaun Russell - Lin's widower and the girls' father - Josie's close friend Lucy Gregson, her former primary school teacher Lynda Roberts and police family liaison officer Pauline Smith

programme.title: D-Day: 100 Days to Beat the Third Reich
programme.desc: An examination of the 100 days it took for the Allies to liberate Normandy, to break through the German line and to pave the way towards victory. It was a period that made history, both heroic and tragic. The first of two programmes retraces events, day by day, from D-Day up to the Liberation of Paris, through a series of moving testimonies and spectacular colourised archives

programme.title: D-Day: 100 Days to Beat the Third Reich
programme.desc: An examination of the 100 days it took for the Allies to liberate Normandy, to break through the German line and to pave the way towards victory. It was a period that made history, both heroic and tragic. This second of two programmes concludes events, considered day by day, up to the Liberation of Paris, through a series of moving testimonies and spectacular colourised archives

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts travels to Bamburgh, Northumberland, to learn about the generations of Anglo Saxons who lived and worked there, gaining an insight into the illnesses they suffered and the societies in which they lived. She visits the Sutton Hoo site, as well as a pioneering project in Sittingbourne, Kent, which was set up following the unearthing of an Anglo Saxon cemetery, and looks at the Staffordshire hoard discovered by a metal detector in 2009

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts spends a year visiting archaeological digs around the country, finding out about discoveries that shed new light on British history. In Buckinghamshire, Simon Mays and Jill Eyers use a recent rediscovery of artefacts from a 1912 excavation to investigate what appears to have been a mass infanticide during the Roman era. Alice also meets the team examining one of the largest discoveries of Roman coins ever made in Britain, and hears about a mystery in Dorset
